steps.title: Use proportional equations
steps.content: For infinitely many solutions, the two equations must represent the same line. The second equation must be a constant multiple of the first.

steps.title: Find the multiplier
steps.content:
Compare the $y$-coefficients and constants.
$$\frac{18}{6}=3$$
$$\frac{21}{7}=3$$
So the $x$-coefficient must also be multiplied by $3$.

steps.title: Scale the x coefficient
steps.content:
Multiply the first equation's $x$-coefficient by $3$.
$$r=3(4)=12$$
The answer is C.
